creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, May 21, 2000 at 10:25:50PM +0200, rguyom@321.net wrote:
> +CONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS=-I${PREFIX}/include LDFLAGS=-L${PREFIX}/lib

You want this to be s/PREFIX/LOCALBASE/g since the place you're
installing mutt may not be the same as devel/gettext.

-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.			ade@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD: The Power to Serve		http://www.FreeBSD.org/
